name: Cocoa Espresso Pudding Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
2. In a large bowl, combine the flour, 2/3 cup sugar, 1/4 cup cocoa powder, instant coffee, baking powder, and salt.
3. In a separate bowl, mix together the milk, melted butter, and vanilla extract.
4. Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until well combined.
5. Spray an 8-inch (20 cm) baking pan with nonstick cooking spray.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared pan.
7. Mix together the remaining 1/3 cup sugar, 2 tablespoons cocoa powder, and sprinkle over the batter.
8. Pour 1 cup boiling water over the batter.
9. Bake for 30 minutes. Serve warm.
